config.seed_text: In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text: We did this for hours before we could find our way out into space... Now it is time to leave now!

In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us.
